Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DepressurizationSimulator

Packages that use DepressurizationSimulator
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization
 

  • Uses of DepressurizationSimulator in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization that return DepressurizationSimulator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setFireHeatInput(double qFire)
    Set fire heat input per API 521 §4.3 (constant heat duty applied to the fluid).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setMaxTime(double tMax)
    Set the maximum simulation time (default 900 s = 15 min).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setStopPressure(double pMin)
    Set the lower-bound stop pressure in Pa (default 1.5 bara = ~atmospheric).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setTimeStep(double dt)
    Set the integration timestep (default 1 s).
    DepressurizationSimulator
    DepressurizationSimulator.setWall(double wallMass, double wallArea, double wallSpecificHeat, double insideHTC)
    Enable lumped-wall thermal modelling for metal temperature tracking (cold blowdown / MDMT).
